lines.content: Just with Einstein Moving Company. How can I help you?

lines.content: Hi there, I'm looking to do kind of a partial residential move. Not, not all my furniture just a few pieces and a bunch of boxes and first of all, I'm in a downtown Austin condo and wondering if you might carry the kind of COI that they require.

lines.content: Yeah, if they're asking for a COI, then we can definitely get that over to you. There's also a chance they might already have ours on file since we do a lot of work downtown but if they don't we can definitely get that.

lines.content: Yeah, we've definitely don't work there before so, yeah, if they need it then we can get it but I know we've given them several over the years, so yeah.

lines.content: Okay. Okay. Yeah, yeah. Okay, good. Then that's on, okay, because well and here's the crazy question the mover I had scheduled for tomorrow, I can't do it because they just can't provide the right coverage. So I was referred to you and wondering when do you have any openings or any coming up soon?

lines.content: Yeah, I can definitely check my calendar. I know tomorrow we don't, I, you it's not the first actually, unfortunately not the first person to call for tomorrow. lines.content: It's, well, it's not that simple it's mostly boxes. And you know what I can count those, I didn't, you know what I have them, I have them right here it's mostly boxes. lines.content: And in terms of boxes, are we talking like, I don't know the twenty or like fifty or more than that, or.

lines.content: Yeah, there you go.
